ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the card */,
  "mana_cost" TEXT /* Mana cost of the card */,
  "cmc" REAL /* Converted mana cost of the card */,
  "color_identity" TEXT /* Color identity of the card */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist who designed the card */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Card number */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the card (e.g., Creature, Sorcery) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text describing the card's abilities */,
  "printings" TEXT /* List of printings the card has been featured in */,
  "flavor" TEXT /* Flavor text associated with the card */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the card */,
  "multiverse_id" INTEGER /* Multiverse ID of the card */,
  "power" REAL /* Power of the card (for creatures) */,
  "toughness" REAL /* Toughness of the card (for creatures) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the card (e.g., Common, Uncommon, Rare) */,
  "subtypes" TEXT /* Subtypes of the card (e.g., Human, Advisor) */,
  "types" TEXT /* Types of the card (e.g., Creature, Spirit) */,
  "oracle_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the card in the Oracle database */,
  "set_code" TEXT /* Code of the set the card belongs to */,
  "set_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the set */,
  "set_block" TEXT /* Block of the set */,
  "loyalty" REAL /* Loyalty of the card (for planeswalkers) */,
  "legalities" TEXT /* JSON field to store the legality of the card in various formats */,
  "watermark" TEXT /* Watermark of the card */,
  "border_color" TEXT /* Border color of the card */,
  "frame" TEXT /* Frame of the card */,
  "frame_effect" TEXT /* Frame effect of the card */,
  "edhrec_rank" INTEGER /* EDHREC rank of the card */,
  "all_parts" TEXT /* JSON field to store information about all parts of the card */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the card's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "printings" (
  "printing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each printing */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card in the printing */,
  "printing_name" TEXT /* Name of the printing */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the printing */,
  "set_code" TEXT /* Code of the set the card belongs to */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the set */,
  "set_type" TEXT /* Type of the set */,
  "set_block" TEXT /* Block of the set */,
  "set_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the set */,
  "set_card_number" INTEGER /* Number of the card in the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("printing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., player, admin) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points earned by the player across all tournaments */,
  "total_tournaments" INTEGER /* Total number of tournaments the player has participated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player owning the cards */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card in the collection */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card in the collection */,
  "foil" INTEGER /* Indicates if the card is a foil */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the card */,
  "acquired_date" TEXT /* Date the card was acquired by the player */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the card was acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_collections_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_collections_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament organizer */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" TEXT /* Prize pool details */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Date when tournament registration opens */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* Date when tournament registration closes */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the tournament */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the player in the tournament */,
  "points" REAL /* Points earned by the player in the tournament */,
  "prize" REAL /* Prize amount or value earned by the player */,
  "deck_list" TEXT /* Player's deck list */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the player's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_results_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_results_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matchups" (
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matchup */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning player */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the matchup */,
  "matchup_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the matchup started */,
  "matchup_end_time" TEXT /* Time when the matchup ended */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the matchup in minutes */,
  "matchup_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the matchup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matchup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matchup */,
  "turn_number" INTEGER /* Turn number in the game */,
  "log_text" TEXT /* Log text describing the game state */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player making the move */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card involved in the move */,
  "move_type" TEXT /* Type of move */,
  "target_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target player (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_matchup_id FOREIGN KEY ("matchup_id") REFERENCES matchups ("matchup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matchup */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the card was played */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage */,
  "usage_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the usage */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who used the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_usage_matchup_id FOREIGN KEY ("matchup_id") REFERENCES matchups ("matchup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_usage_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_usage_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "popularity_rank" INTEGER /* Popularity rank of the card */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the card */,
  "popularity_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the card's popularity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the popularity rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_popularity_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)
